data_description.account_name: Et venligt navn til denne AWS-konto
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: Hvor ofte AWS API'er skal forespørges (5-60 minutter)
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Aktiverer historikdiagrammer for ressourceoptællinger (bruger flere sensorer)

regions.title: Vælg AWS-regioner
regions.description: Vælg hvilke regioner der skal overvåges

services.title: Select Services to Monitor
services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Only enable services you actually use. The next step will show the minimum IAM policy needed for your selection.

iam_policy.title: IAM Policy
iam_policy.description:
Apply this minimum IAM policy to your AWS user before clicking Finish.

```json
{policy}
```

Policy covers {service_count} service(s).

error.connection: Kan ikke oprette forbindelse til AWS. Tjek din internetforbindelse.

data_description.refresh_interval: Hvor ofte AWS skal tjekkes for ressourceopdateringer (1-60 minutter)
data_description.cost_refresh_interval: Hvor ofte AWS Cost Explorer skal tjekkes (60-1440 minutter). Omkostningsdata opdateres en gang dagligt, at tjekke oftere spilder penge ($0,01 per API-kald).
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Opret separate optællingssensorer for hver ressourcetype (EC2, RDS, Lambda, osv.)
data_description.skip_initial_refresh: Vent ikke på data ved opstart - hent ved første planlagte opdatering

select_services.title: Select Services to Monitor
select_services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Removing a service will delete its sensors. Adding a service may require updating your IAM policy.

iam_additions.title: IAM Policy Update Required
iam_additions.description:
You have added services that require new IAM permissions. Add the following actions to your IAM policy before saving:

```
{actions}
```

refresh_account.name: Opdater konto
refresh_account.description: Opdater manuelt alle AWS-data for en konto

account_name.name: Kontonavn
account_name.description: Navnet på AWS-kontoen der skal opdateres
